meaning: n.[鸟]珩,珩科鸟(如凤头麦鸡)
examples: The two ambulance attendants quickly put Plover on a stretcher and got him into the ambulance.
The plover lives by the ocean and feeds on small shellfish, insects and plants.
A variety of seabirds and shorebirds inhabit the islands, including the endangered brown pelican, least tern, and piping plover.
"Piping Plover Tastes Like Chicken" goes the bumper sticker occasionally sighted on the East End of Long Island.
Because Breezy Point hadn't been hit by a storm of Sandy's magnitude for decades, piping-plover habitat there had shrunk.
